name: Wickerhead Co. Cafe's Cranberry Buttermilk Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 1/4 cup of the flour with cranberries and let stand overnight to absorb excess moisture.
2. The next day, mix the remaining flour and all other dry ingredients. Cut in butter until the mixture is the consistency of oatmeal.
3. Stir in the cranberries into the flour mixture along with orange rind.
4. Blend eggs and buttermilk together.
5. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients, mixing until just blended. If the dough is sticky, flour your hands and pat it into a 6-inch ball.
6. Score the scone deeply into six wedges.
7. Bake in a 400°F oven until the top turns golden and springs back, about 15 minutes.
8. Glaze with fresh cream and sugar immediately after baking.
